about:
An Information Technology student passionate about technology, innovation, and creating meaningful digital experiences. I enjoy learning new technologies, solving challenging problems, and continuously improving my skills through hands-on development.

 Outside of coding, I love traveling, exploring photography, and listening to music. These interests keep me inspired, broaden my perspective, and encourage creativity in everything I do.

 I'm always excited to learn, collaborate, and contribute to projects that make a real impact.
